prompt_text:
### Demographics: 42-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 8 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Pioglitazone 15mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 87.5 kg; Height 163.6 cm; BMI 32.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.7%; 9 months ago 9.4%; 6 months ago 8.9%; 3 months ago 8.4%; current 7.1%), FPG (12 months ago 247mg/dL; 9 months ago 244mg/dL; 6 months ago 207mg/dL; 3 months ago 175mg/dL; current 162mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 88.9kg; 9 months ago 86.9kg; 6 months ago 87.2kg; 3 months ago 82.3kg; current 87.5kg), Height (12 months ago 163.6cm; 9 months ago 163.6cm; 6 months ago 163.6cm; 3 months ago 163.6cm; current 163.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 32.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 71U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 62U/L; current 65U/L), AST (12 months ago 63U/L; 9 months ago 62U/L; 6 months ago 61U/L; 3 months ago 56U/L; current 58U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 35mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 230mg/g; 9 months ago 264mg/g; 6 months ago 278mg/g; 3 months ago 290mg/g; current 249mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 78mg/dL; 9 months ago 79mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 34mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 35mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 134mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 132mg/dL; 3 months ago 118mg/dL; current 125mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.9g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
